sidebar.title:
Quality Spec &
Test Automation
sidebar.tagline: Generates quality specs and TDD contracts before build. Executes and maintains test automation during and after build — in CI/CD and alongside Builder Agent.

principle.label: ⚡ Key Principle — Quality-first
principle.text: Test definitions are the starting contract. TDD contracts sent to Builder before a single line of code is written.

inputs.text: Test plan + test case template library

cards.title: QA Engineer Workspace
cards.note: Author quality specs, review test plans, approve TDD contracts before build

cards.title: CI/CD Pipeline Runner
cards.note: Automated execution surface — runs contracts, reports defects, gates deployment

bullets.text: HITL checkpoints before build + before deploy

components.name: Quality Strategy
components.note: Testing approach per domain · coverage targets · risk tiers · QA guidelines

components.name: Spec → Acceptance Criteria
components.note: Reqs → testable AC · HITL-validated before coding

components.name: Test Plan Generator
components.note: Structured test plan · functional + NFR coverage · defect surfacing strategy

components.name: TDD Contract
components.note: Sent to Builder Agent first · defines Red→Green→Refactor gate

components.name: Test Script Generator
components.note: TDD contract stubs (unit) · integration + E2E scripts

components.name: Automated Test Maintenance
components.note: Generate + maintain test suite · keep aligned with codebase changes

components.name: Defect Detection
components.note: Surface functional + non-functional defects during build phase

components.name: Test Report Generator
components.note: Coverage dashboard · defect reports · living quality baseline

cards.name: QA Ways-of-Working
cards.desc: Testing practices · quality standards · AI-native QA guidelines · tools-specific config

cards.name: Test Asset Library
cards.desc: Test plan templates · test case templates · strategy patterns

cards.name: Test Automation Assets
cards.desc: Reusable script templates · automation patterns · coverage baselines

rag.label: RAG / Retrieval Pipeline
rag.body: Vector store · semantic search over enterprise guidelines, test cases, automation patterns, codebase and defect history

cards.name: CI/CD Pipeline
cards.detail: Build triggers · test execution · gate enforcement

cards.name: Code Coverage
cards.detail: Coverage analysis · threshold enforcement · trend tracking

cards.name: Defect Tracking
cards.detail: Issue creation · defect linkage to specs and commits

cards.name: ↗ Builder Agent
cards.detail: Receives TDD contracts · triggers Test Script Generator · returns build artefacts for validation
